testcase.name: test_06_stage2_surgical_requires_phase2_approved
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stage2_workflow.py:195: in test_06_stage2_surgical_requires_phase2_approved assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","checklist","items",0,"label"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"id":"healing_assessment","value":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_stage2_prosthetic_requires_surgical_approved
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stage2_workflow.py:316: in test_09_stage2_prosthetic_requires_surgical_approved assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","checklist","items",0,"label"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"id":"impression_taken","value":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_17_stage2_surgical_rejection_creates_new_procedure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stage2_workflow.py:525: in test_17_stage2_surgical_rejection_creates_new_procedure assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_18_rejected_procedures_filter
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stage2_workflow.py:583: in test_18_rejected_procedures_filter assert pytest.reject_procedure_id in reject_ids, "Rejected test procedure not in rejected filter" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'reject_procedure_id'
